name: PM-KISAN
benefit: ₹6,000 per year in 3 equal installments of ₹2,000 directly to eligible farmers
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with cultivable land. Land records must be updated in state portals.
howToApply: Visit nearest Common Service Centre (CSC) or apply online at pmkisan.gov.in. Village Level Worker (VLW) can also help.

name: PMFBY
benefit: Comprehensive crop insurance covering pre-sowing to post-harvest losses. Premium: 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi crops, 5% for commercial/horticultural crops.
eligibility: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas. Loanee farmers are enrolled compulsorily.
howToApply: Apply through nearest bank branch, CSC, or PMFBY portal within cut-off date for each crop/season.

name: PKVY
benefit: ₹50,000 per hectare over 3 years for organic farming transition. Covers inputs, certification, and market linkage.
eligibility: Farmers willing to form clusters of 50 farmers (50 acres) and adopt organic farming practices for 3 years.
howToApply: Form a Farmer Interest Group (FIG) of 50 farmers, register at district agriculture office, or through local Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK).

name: PMKSY
benefit: Subsidy on drip/sprinkler irrigation systems (up to 90% for small/marginal farmers). 'Har Khet Ko Pani, More Crop Per Drop.'
eligibility: All farmers. Priority to small/marginal farmers. Available through state implementing agencies.
howToApply: Apply through District Agriculture Officer or online at pmksy.gov.in. Empanelled vendors provide system with subsidy.

name: KCC
benefit: Short-term credit up to ₹3 lakh at 7% interest rate (4% effective with 3% interest subvention). Covers crop production, maintenance, and post-harvest needs.
eligibility: All farmers, sharecroppers, tenant farmers, and self-help groups engaged in farming/allied activities.
howToApply: Apply at any scheduled bank, cooperative bank, or regional rural bank. PM-KISAN beneficiaries get KCC through saturation drive.

name: SMAM
benefit: Subsidy of 40-50% (up to 80% for SC/ST and small/marginal farmers) on farm machinery including tractors, power tillers, harvester, and other equipment.
eligibility: Individual farmers, farmer groups, and Custom Hiring Centres. Priority to SC/ST and women farmers.
howToApply: Apply online through state agriculture department portal or visit District Agriculture Officer. Machines are available through empanelled dealers.

name: NFSM
benefit: Free/subsidized improved seeds, nutrients, and technical support for rice, wheat, pulses, and coarse cereals. Demonstrations, training camps and farm visits.
eligibility: Farmers in identified districts growing notified crops. Priority to small and marginal farmers.
howToApply: Contact Block Agriculture Officer or attend crop demonstration camps. Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK) in your district can provide details.

name: RKVY
benefit: Flexible funding for infrastructure, post-harvest management, agri-startups, and farmer producer organizations (FPOs). Up to ₹25 lakh for agri-entrepreneurs.
eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, agri-startups, and state government agriculture departments. Raftaar component specifically supports agri-entrepreneurs.
howToApply: Contact District Agriculture Officer or state RKVY nodal officer. Agri-startups can apply through state agriculture universities.
